/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/run_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/run_tests.dir/tests/test_main.cpp.o -o run_tests  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib liblogic_lib.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgmock.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a
